To earn the maximum veFXS boost (0.000x), you need at least veFXS per 1 FRAX in LP.
Neither the Frax protocol, core developers, nor FXS holders endorse any particular project that has received a gauge. Users who deposit into each gauge contract are exposed to the direct risk of the LP tokens they stake.
